description: Shui Fong is a major Triad group based in Hong Kong, originating from a workers' union of a soft drink company in the 1930s. It operates in Hong Kong, Macau, and Chinese communities abroad, engaging in extortion, loan sharking, narcotics, and control of nightclubs and gambling dens. It is one of Hong Kong's most active triads and part of Macau's 'Four Major Gangs'. The group has been involved in violent conflicts with rivals like 14K.

country_links.evidence_quote: Documents filed with the Federal Court of Canada show that Lai laundered millions of dollars in Canada...
country_links.context: Shui Fong's alleged boss in Macau laundered millions of dollars in Canada.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Shui Fong operates in Dublin and Belfast.
country_links.context: Shui Fong operates in Dublin and Belfast.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Macau, Shui Fong is one of the 'Four Major Gangs' (四大黑幫), the others being Wo Shing Yee, 14K and the Big Circle Gang.
country_links.context: Shui Fong is one of the 'Four Major Gangs' in Macau and was involved in a gang war there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Shui Fong is active in London, Southampton, Glasgow and Belfast... carries out extortion on the Chinese community.
country_links.context: Shui Fong is active in London, Southampton, Glasgow and Belfast, engaging in crimes and extortion.
